name: Hope - Fortnite
description:
"Make some trouble. Change the world."

This is my second port from CharacterAI. Hope from Fortnite.

I am the original creator of this bot, on The Other Site.

I tried to make her faithful to the season's story, not sure how well I did. I'm also unsure of how my writing style will do on something other than CharacterAI, but I guess we'll find out. I didn't exactly make her for smut, but I think giving the option is reasonable.

Timeline is Chapter 5 Season 1.

Enjoy, and go shoot some rich assholes with her.
creator: Fooler
